# QuickQuote CA

> QuickQuote CA is an AI-powered quote generator built specifically for Canadian tradespeople. Contractors describe a job in plain English, and the app generates a professional PDF quote with correct GST, HST, PST, or QST calculated for the client's province — then emails it directly to the client.

## What makes it different

- **Canadian-first tax engine.** Built-in logic for all 13 provinces and territories: HST (ON, NB, NS, NL, PEI), GST+PST (BC, MB, SK), GST+QST (QC), and GST-only (AB, NT, NU, YT).
- **Mobile-first.** Designed for trades to quote on-site from a phone, not a desk.
- **AI line-item parsing.** Paste a job description, get a structured quote with quantities and prices.
- **Branded PDFs.** Company name, quote number, itemized costs, and tax breakdown.
- **Direct email delivery.** Send the PDF to the client from the app — no downloading, no attaching.

## Who it's for

Canadian contractors, electricians, plumbers, HVAC technicians, roofers, painters, landscapers, renovators, flooring installers, deck builders, handymen, welders, and every other Canadian trade.

## Pricing

- **Free**: 3 quotes per month. AI parsing, PDF generation, email delivery, and the full Canadian tax engine included.
- **Pro**: $15 CAD per month. Unlimited quotes, priority support, early access to new features. Cancel any time.

No credit card required to start.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://quickquote-ca.vercel.app/): Product overview, features, pricing, FAQ
- [Pricing section](https://quickquote-ca.vercel.app/#pricing): Free vs Pro comparison
- [Sign up](https://quickquote-ca.vercel.app/auth/signup): Free account in 30 seconds
- [Sign in](https://quickquote-ca.vercel.app/auth/login): Existing user login
- [Terms of Service](https://quickquote-ca.vercel.app/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](https://quickquote-ca.vercel.app/privacy)

## Tech stack

Next.js 14 (App Router) · Supabase (Postgres + Auth) · Claude Haiku (Anthropic API) for AI parsing · @react-pdf/renderer for PDF · Resend for email · Stripe for payments · Hosted on Vercel.

## Contact

Hosted at [quickquote-ca.vercel.app](https://quickquote-ca.vercel.app). Support via in-app chat for Pro users.
